---
title: "GLMM"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse) # version 2.0.0
library(sf) #1.0-21
library(here) #1.0.1
library(janitor) #2.2.1
library(stars) #0.6-8
library(terra) #1.8-42
library(glmmTMB) #1.1.14
library(arcgislayers)
library(gtsummary)
library(gtExtras)

source(here("R", "spatial_join.R"))
source(here('R', 'rich_gini.R'))
```

1. Aggregated biodiversity by Area Search
```{r}

# Obtain aggregated biodiversity data for Area Search
biodiv_area_search_agg <- birds_joined %>% 
  # Filter for only Area Search data
  filter(survey_type %in% "Area Search") %>% 
  # Run Gini Simpson function to obtain biodiversity values
  gini_simpson() %>% 
  # Add a column aggregating GAP Status by protection type
  mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 'Protected', 'Non-protected'))

# Pull out unique habitat types
habitats <- unique(biodiv_area_search_agg$habitat_type)

# Initialize list for each filtered habitat type
tmp <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)

# Initialize list for summary object of each model
area_agg <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)

# Run GLMM over each habitat type and fill in summary object
for (i in habitats){
  
  tmp[[i]] <- biodiv_area_search_agg %>% 
    st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    filter(habitat_type == i)
  
  
 area_agg[[i]] <- glmmTMB(rich_gini ~ protection, family = beta_family(), data = tmp[[i]])
}

```

2. Aggregated biodiversity by Point Count
```{r}
biodiv_point_count_agg <- birds_joined %>% 
  filter(survey_type %in% "Point Count") %>% 
  gini_simpson() %>% 
  mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 'Protected', 'Non-protected'))

habitats <- unique(biodiv_point_count_agg$habitat_type)
tmp <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)
point_agg <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)

for (i in habitats){
  
  tmp[[i]] <- biodiv_point_count_agg %>% 
    st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    filter(habitat_type == i)
  
  
  point_agg[[i]] <- glmmTMB(rich_gini ~ protection, family = beta_family(), data = tmp[[i]])
}

```

3. Non-aggregated biodiversity by Area Search

```{r}
biodiv_area_search_disag <- birds_joined %>% 
  filter(survey_type %in% "Area Search") %>% 
  gini_simpson()

habitats <- unique(biodiv_area_search_disag$habitat_type)
tmp <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)
area_disag <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)

for (i in habitats){
  
  tmp[[i]] <- biodiv_area_search_disag %>% 
    st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    filter(habitat_type == i)
  
  
  area_disag[[i]] <- glmmTMB(rich_gini ~ gap_sts, family = beta_family(), data = tmp[[i]])
}
```

4. Non-aggregated biodiversity by Point Count
```{r}
biodiv_point_count_disag <- birds_joined %>% 
  filter(survey_type %in% "Point Count") %>% 
  gini_simpson()

habitats <- unique(biodiv_point_count_disag$habitat_type)
tmp <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)
point_disag <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)

for (i in habitats){
  
  tmp[[i]] <-biodiv_point_count_disag %>% 
    st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    filter(habitat_type == i)
  
  
  point_disag[[i]] <- glmmTMB(rich_gini ~ gap_sts, family = beta_family(), data = tmp[[i]])
}
```
# Create model summary of aggregated biodiversity across point and area search
```{r}
# Extract gtsummary objects from model outputs
# Area Search aggregated model output
area_agg_summary <- map(area_agg, ~tbl_regression(.x))
# Point Count aggregated model output
point_agg_summary <- map(point_agg, ~tbl_regression(.x))

# Create summary table output
aggregated_model_table <- tbl_merge(
  tbls = c(area_agg_summary, point_agg_summary), 
  # by = habitat_type,
  # include = c(Beta, p-value, site, year), 
  # tab_header = c('Area Search', 'Point Count'),
  # tab_spanner = c(names(area_agg), names(point_agg))
)

# Show example table
aggregated_model_table



# USE: gt_summary::tbl_summary()
spiny_summary <- spiny_counts %>%
  gtsummary::tbl_summary(
    # Select how you want to group columns
    by = treat,
    # Variables to include
    include = c(counts, mean_size, site, year), 
    missing = "no", # don't list missing data separately
    # Display mean and standard deviation for all continuous variables
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})"),
     label = list(
      counts    ~ "Counts",
      mean_size ~ "Mean Size",
      site      ~ "Site",
      year      ~ "Year"
    )
  ) %>% 
    # Bold labels
    bold_labels() %>% 
  # Add p value
  add_p()


spiny_summary %>% 
  as_gt() %>%
  
  # Add a Title and Subtitle
  tab_header(
    title = "Spiny Lobsters in MPA vs Non-Mpa"
  ) %>%
    
    # Style the header
    tab_style( 
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#A0185A"),
      cell_text(color = "white")),
      locations = cells_title()) %>% 
    
    # Style the column labels
    tab_style( 
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#A0185A"),
      cell_text(color = "white")),
      locations = cells_column_labels(everything())) %>%
    
    # Style the cells body 
    tab_style( 
    style = cell_fill(color = "#FFC4EB"),
        locations = cells_body()) %>%
    
    # Style the footnote 
    tab_style( 
    style = list(cell_fill(color = "#FFC4EB"),
            cell_text(weight = "bold")), # Weight the footnote bold so it pops
            locations = cells_footnotes()) %>%
    
  # Change column label
  cols_label( 
    label = "Total Lobster",
    p.value = "P-Value" 
  ) %>%
  
  # Add a source note at the bottom
  tab_source_note(
    source_note = "Note: Data from Reed D. 2019."
  ) %>% 
    # Style the header
    tab_style( 
    style = list(
      cell_fill(color = "#A0185A"),
      cell_text(color = "white")),
      locations = cells_source_notes())
```
